paneContent:
в”‚ CONN=$(curl -s -X POST "${STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL}/_storyboard/canvas/connector" \
  в”‚ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  в”‚ -d "{\"name\":\"${STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID}\",\"startWidgetId\":\"${STORYBOARD_WIDGET_ID}
  в”‚ \",\"endWidgetId\":\"${NEW_ID}\",\"startAnchor\":\"right\",\"endAnchor\":\"left\"}")
  в”‚ echo "  Connected: $CONN"
  в”‚ done
  в”” 15 lines

в—Џ Delete debug test sticky (shell)
  в”‚
  в”‚ {"success":true,"removed":1}
  в”‚ <exited with exit code 0>
  в”‚
  в”‚ cd /Users/dfosco/workspace/storyboard-core/.worktrees/4.3.0--prompt-widget
  в”‚ 
  в”‚ # Clean up the debug test sticky from earlier
  в”‚ curl -s -X DELETE "${STORYBOARD_SERVER_URL}/_storyboard/canvas/widget" \
  в”‚ -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
  в”‚ -d "{\"name\":\"${STORYBOARD_CANVAS_ID}\",\"widgetId\":\"sticky-note-eneqgc\"}"
  в”” 2 lines

в—Џ Done! Created 7 color-coded stickies вЂ” рџЋЇ Focus, рџ’Ў Idea, вњ… Done, рџ”Ґ Urgent, рџ§Є
  Test,
  рџ“ќ Note, в­ђ Star вЂ” all connected to me with connectors. They're arranged in a grid to
  my right.
